channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-73] RHEL6 kernel support
item.description:
We need to support rhel6 and rhel6 patchless clients for 2.1 release.

Xyratex has the patches that they might want to share with us.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

> Please note that this patch is a short term solution.
> Girish, it would be great if you could come up with another patch which takes
> i_data_sem write reference where it is needed in ext4_walk_space().

See LU-216 for this issue.

this patch does not touch 64 quota checking.

in lustre/autoconf/lustre-core.m4

AC_DEFUN([LC_HAVE_QUOTAIO_V1_H],
[LB_CHECK_FILE([$LINUX/include/linux/quotaio_v1.h],[
        AC_DEFINE(HAVE_QUOTAIO_V1_H, 1,
                [kernel has include/linux/quotaio_v1.h])
],[LB_CHECK_FILE([$LINUX/fs/quota/quotaio_v1.h],[
               AC_DEFINE(HAVE_FS_QUOTA_QUOTAIO_V1_H, 1,
                [kernel has fs/quota/quotaio_v1.h])
],[
        AC_MSG_RESULT([no])
])
])
])

It should find that rhel6 quotaio_v1.h locates under fs/quota, hence define HAVE_FS_QUOTA_QUOTAIO_V1_H

and later in LC_QUOTA64 checking

AC_DEFUN([LC_QUOTA64],[
        AC_MSG_CHECKING([if kernel has 64-bit quota limits support])
tmp_flags="$EXTRA_KCFLAGS"
EXTRA_KCFLAGS="-I$LINUX/fs"
        LB_LINUX_TRY_COMPILE([
                #include <linux/kernel.h>
                #include <linux/fs.h>
                #ifdef HAVE_QUOTAIO_V1_H
                # include <linux/quotaio_v2.h>
                int versions[] = V2_INITQVERSIONS_R1;
                struct v2_disk_dqblk_r1 dqblk_r1;
                #else
                # ifdef HAVE_FS_QUOTA_QUOTAIO_V1_H        =====>   *should fall into here*
                #  include <quota/quotaio_v2.h>
                # else
                #  include <quotaio_v2.h>
                # endif
                struct v2r1_disk_dqblk dqblk_r1;
                #endif
        ],[],[
                AC_DEFINE(HAVE_QUOTA64, 1, [have quota64])
                AC_MSG_RESULT([yes])
        ],[
                LB_CHECK_FILE([$LINUX/include/linux/lustre_version.h],[
                        AC_MSG_ERROR([You have got no 64-bit kernel quota support.])
                ],[])
                AC_MSG_RESULT([no])
        ])
EXTRA_KCFLAGS=$tmp_flags
])

it should successfully compile and define HAVE_QUOTA64.

I just ran it against linux-2.6.32-71.18.1.el6 src code.

# ./configure --with-linux=/mnt/kernel/linux-2.6.32-71.18.1.el6-master
...
...
checking if kernel has 64-bit quota limits support... yes

When I try to build a lustre server with these patches I get a configure failure:

checking if kernel has 64-bit quota limits support... checking for /home/brian/lustre-release/BUILD/reused/usr/src/kernels/2.6.32-71.el6_lustre.gaaba6fa.x86_64/include/linux/lustre_version.h... (cached) yes
configure: error: You have got no 64-bit kernel quota support.

which appears to be because in the RHEL6 kernel there is no quotaio_v2.h. Is this a known issue with these patches still? Should we disable quota building for the time being?

Hi,

Here is a tarball containing (a series file and) all the patches we apply on top of Lustre 2.0.0.1 in order to run servers and clients on RHEL6 GA.

Let me detail the patches:

  • lustre-kernel-rhel6-HEAD.patch: kernel part of the patches, this is attachment 29734 from bugzilla 22375
  • ldiskfs-rhel6-HEAD.patch: ldiskfs part of the patches, this is attachment 30186 from bugzilla 22375
  • lustre-rhel6-HEAD.patch: lustre part of the patches, this is a slight improvement from attachement 30187 from bugzilla 22375
  • lustre-rhel6-HEAD_fix_DQUOT_INIT.patch: lustre part of the patches, it correponds to attachment 31205 from bugzilla 22375
  • lustre-rhel6-HEAD_fix_cap_effective.patch: lustre part of the patches, it corresponds to attachment 31206 from bugzilla 22375
  • lustre-rhel6-HEAD_fix_walk_stack.patch: lustre part of the patches, this is attachment 31628 from bugzilla 22375
  • 2.6.32_blk_queue_sectors_segments.patch: lustre part of the patches, this is attachment 30289 from bugzilla 22375
  • 2.6.32_shrinker.patch: lustre part of the patches, this is attachment 32336 from bugzilla 22375.

Sebastien.
